name: ProjectCard
description: Teaser for one case study from the projects content collection: image, title, period, keywords.

useCases: Featured projects on the home page

antiPatterns.scenario: Feeding ProjectCard hand-written props instead of a collection entry
antiPatterns.reason: Bypasses the content schema; teaser and case study can drift apart.
antiPatterns.alternative: Add the project to src/content/projects and pass the entry.

a11y: Whole card is one link; the hero image is decorative (empty alt)
